summary: Frontend refactoring validation complete. All 7 refactored pages load correctly after major component extraction (DatabasePage 1148->112 lines, CreateFichePage 760->378, PropertyFormPage 666->415, ProcedureBuilder 634->295, AdminProceduresDashboard 571->167, ProcedureDetailPage 514->369). All 15+ sub-component files are properly imported and rendering.
critical_code_review_comments: ESLint warnings in AdminProceduresDashboard.js (missing fetchProcedures dependency), PropertyFormPage.js (missing 'set' dependency), ProcedureDetailPage.js (steps useMemo dependency) - these are minor and don't affect functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: All refactored components verified working: DatabasePage (6 tabs: Demandes, Utilisateurs, Articles, Annonces, Paiements, Prix m²), AdminProceduresDashboard (sidebar, stats, procedures list), CreateFichePage (form fields, steps, PDF preview), ProcedureBuilder (form, sidebar, steps), PropertyFormPage (image upload, map, form fields), ProcedureDetailPage (steps, sidebar, documents). User status badges correctly show green for actif, red for suspendu, yellow for pending_verification.
